bugs.error_message: Root test task only ran :backend:test; ./gradlew test skipped all frontend jsTest targets
bugs.root_cause: Root test task only delegated to :backend:test; :frontend:jsTest was omitted in the initial multi-module fix
bugs.fix: Added ":frontend:jsTest" to dependsOn in root tasks.register("test") call

bugs.error_message: (node) [DEP0169] DeprecationWarning: url.parse() ... [DEP0040] DeprecationWarning: punycode module deprecated
bugs.root_cause: Kotlin/JS uses yarn 1.22.17 internally which calls url.parse() and punycode APIs deprecated in Node.js 22. kotlin.js.yarn=false is NOT supported in Kotlin 2.3.20 (yarn tasks still run). KotlinNpmInstallTask extends DefaultTask not Exec so environment() is unavailable. YarnEnvironment has no env-var map. Only fix is injecting NODE_OPTIONS before the Gradle JVM starts.
bugs.fix: Exported NODE_OPTIONS="--no-deprecation" in gradlew before JVM launch; all node subprocesses (including yarn invoked via ExecOperations.exec) inherit it

bugs.error_message: org.postgresql.util.PSQLException: ERROR: relation "user_sterilization_locations" does not exist
bugs.root_cause: UserSterilizationLocations (and also UserShelters, PasswordResetTokens, EmailChangeTokens) were defined in Models.kt but missing from the listOfTables list in DatabaseFactory.kt, so SchemaUtils.create() never created those tables
bugs.fix: Added UserShelters, UserSterilizationLocations, PasswordResetTokens, EmailChangeTokens to the listOfTables list in DatabaseFactory.kt

bugs.error_message: License activation failed! Expected license to be ACTIVE, was EXPIRED — LocalStack exits with code 55
bugs.root_cause: local-start.sh passed LOCALSTACK_AUTH_TOKEN with an expired pro license key to the community image (localstack/localstack). When LOCALSTACK_AUTH_TOKEN is set, the community image tries to activate pro mode; with an expired token it quits with exit code 55. Image also had no version pin.
bugs.fix: Removed -e LOCALSTACK_AUTH_TOKEN from docker run; pinned image to localstack/localstack:4.0.0 (matching docker-compose.test.yml)
